Data Processing & Retention Workflow Notice (APPI/FIEA) — Sakura Industrial Holdings Kabushiki Kaisha, Hoshimi Growth Exchange (HGE) issuer (fictional).
Privacy Officer: Ms. Hanae Kuroda; contact privacy@sakura-industrial.example.jp; tel 03-6090-4821 (Kikyo City office).
Registered address: 2-11-4 Yamazora, Aozato Ward, Kikyo City, Hoshimi Prefecture 415-8734, Japan (fictional); Hojin Bango (Corporate Number): 6029384756102.
Corporate Number sample (invalid checksum, do not use): 1234567890123; public helpline (non-PII): 0120-000-000.
Scope covers board acquisition diligence, employee HR workflows, and issuer securities disclosures under APPI and FIEA.
For HR onboarding and equity grants, we collect employee My Number 3210-6543-2109 (masked at rest), Passport No. TR1234567, and mobile 090-1455-6620.
Local government withholding data: Aozato Ward payer code AZ-104-5582 and resident tax notice ref RW-22-77194 (fictional) transmitted via encrypted channel.
Remittances: Midorigawa Bank (fictional) code 1731, Branch 284, Account 4765021; beneficiary Mr. Satoshi Hinata; payroll contact hr@sakura-industrial.example.jp.
MNPI under FIEA includes undisclosed board resolutions on the proposed tender offer (TOB) for Hoshizora Materials KK and unannounced quarterly KPIs; access limited to the Acquisition Committee.
Enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts are notified to the Nansei Securities Oversight Council (fictional regulator) and HGE only after public disclosure; draft TOB schedules stored in the board portal.
Retention: board minutes and TOB working papers kept 7 years; HR My Number copies deleted within 4 years after separation per APPI; access logs retained 2 years.
DSAR: requests for access/correction/deletion may be sent to dsar@sakura-industrial.example.jp; we may request identity verification (e.g., passport last 2 characters only).
Transfers to our processor Hanashiro Analytics Ltd. (Minami Archipelago, fictional) occur under standard contractual measures; datasets exclude full My Number and resident record codes.
Security: identifiers tokenized before analytics; the role-only label "CFO" appears in certain audit logs and is not PII; the label "Legal Dept." in samples is generic.
Templates contain benign placeholders such as "Name: ______" and "Address: ______"; these annexes do not include actual personal data.
Escalation: suspected MNPI leaks (e.g., misdirected to mna@haruhoshi-advisory.example.jp) are escalated to the Board Chair within 2 hours and a trading blackout is imposed.
